# Hydrocarbon Loss

**Summary**: The reduction of mobile hydrocarbons from a rock sample due to environmental factors.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023]] quantified hydrocarbon loss in unpreserved samples.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023]] Critical for accurate source rock evaluation.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023]] Comparison of S1 and S2 values between preserved and unpreserved samples.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Un-preserved samples showed significant drops in S1, S2, and TOC values compared with the average preserved samples. ([[2023-al-eid|Al-Eid, 2023, p. 17]])
